title: The Real Tiger
subTitle: When a truck collides with his car, an exemplary politician goes into a coma. His police officer son learns that the accident is a deliberate attack and sets out to hunt down the perpetrators and exact his revenge.

title: Illaka
subTitle: Two brothers grow up and end up choosing career paths that are polar opposites, one becomes a smuggler and the other a police officer.

title: Insaniyat
subTitle: Inspector Amar must unite two rival crime bosses from different religious backgrounds to fight terrorism. In the process, he discovers the personal cost of being an honest cop.

title: Sherdil Bharat
subTitle: Bringing the best in cinema.

title: Main Inteqam Loonga
subTitle: A man discovers the truth behind his father's tragic demise and vows to avenge him, oblivious to the consequences that await him.

title: Chori Mera Kaam
subTitle: Chori Mera Kaam

title: Shaktiman
subTitle: When Vicky and Amar get switched at birth, one grows up to be a police officer and the other a murderer. Things take a turn when their parents learn the truth.

title: Andhaa Kaanoon
subTitle: Two siblings, Vijay and Durga, vow to avenge the death of their parents. So, Durga becomes an inspector to punish the criminals, whereas Vijay breaks the law to achieve his goal.

title: Aakhri Ghulam
subTitle: Bheema and his family live under the tyranny of their master, Daulat Singh. But, when Bheema revolts, his love for his master's daughter is threatened.

title: Aakhri Ghulam
subTitle: Bheema and his family live under the tyranny of their master, Daulat Singh. But, when Bheema revolts, his love for his master's daughter is threatened.

title: Drishyam
subTitle: When his daughter accidentally kills a man in self-defence, Georgekutty uses his film knowledge to cover it up. Even when the investigation catches up with them, Georgekutty looks out for his family.

title: Pyar Ki Kahani
subTitle: Ram, a peon, forms a close friendship with a man named Ravi and values his opinion. However, he is shocked when Ravi disapproves of his fiancee and gets more upset when he learns the reason why.

title: Blackmail
subTitle: Kailash's uncle discovers a formula to save energy, which could make him very wealthy. Mr Mehta, an industrialist, envies his success and devises an evil plan to steal the formula.

title: Wafadaar
subTitle: Chanda's parents disapprove of her boyfriend Ranga and want her to marry Prasad. Ranga is accused of having an affair with Sita.

title: Mela
subTitle: Best mates Kishen and Shankar decide to help village belle Roopa avenge her family's death, but their friendship is tested in the process.

title: Zakhmi Sipahi
subTitle: Shakti is an honest police officer out to avenge the death of his father. He faces many trials and tribulations in his journey towards fulfilling this task.

title: Chaalbaaz
subTitle: Anju endures mistreatment at home, whereas her long-separated twin Manju boldly navigates life's challenges. By some quirk of fate, they end up trading places, and their worlds erupt in chaos.

title: Hatya
subTitle: When Sagar finds a boy on the street, he brings him home and treats him well. But, he soon finds that the boy's mother has been killed and that he has become the prime suspect.

title: Meri Haan Teri Naa
subTitle: A man manages to get into the Indian cricket team, but he decides to give it up so that his best friend can get married to the man she loves.
